close_reason: Positive observation: Backend vs Unavailable split is correct
description:
src/lib.rs:112-129 — map_http_status puts 5xx and 429 into Unavailable (transient, retry helps) and everything else into Backend (permanent, retry won't help). The doc comment justifies the split. This matches the SecretError variant docstrings in secretx-core (src/lib.rs:976-1012).

Future contributor temptation: 'simpler if everything became Backend; let the caller decide retry policy.' Counter: SecretError::Unavailable exists specifically so that the cache layer or the umbrella crate's retry helpers can distinguish without parsing error messages. The split is by-design; preserve it.
title: Distinct Backend vs Unavailable mapping for transient vs permanent errors
